{{CargoRelic
|name=Best Feeder Sculpture
|class_id=20264
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=Reward of Rocket upgrade
|description=This wooden sculpture was awarded by the Bird family to the best tamers of all ages. When the selection of this award is completed, a professional sculptor will carve a wooden sculpture based on the winner's image for future generations to look up to!
|fame=17
|art=18
|fth=30
|civ=13
|tech=12
|ss1=Per 40 Eggs hatched, Snail ATK +1<br>Eggs hatched: 1600/1600
|ss2=Per 40 Eggs hatched, Snail ATK +2<br>Eggs hatched: 1600/1600
|ss3=Per 40 Eggs hatched, Snail ATK +3<br>Eggs hatched: 1600/1600
}}

[[Category:ATK Boost]]
